topic_title: Hantavirus outbreak on MV Hondius cruise ship triggers international health alerts
topic_summary: Passengers evacuated from the MV Hondius to the US and France have tested positive for hantavirus, prompting the World Health Organization to monitor the situation. Health authorities in multiple countries are implementing tracking measures as more cases emerge from the vessel.

findings.title: Brote de hantavirus en el crucero MV Hondius hoy, EN VIVO: número de contagios, la cepa Andes y las últimas noticias de este 11 de mayo
findings.summary: Dos pasajeros evacuados del crucero dieron positivo y un tercero tiene síntomas de la enfermedad. Son una francesa y dos estadounidenses.Seguí todas las novedades del brote de hantavirus de este lunes 11 de mayo, minuto a minuto.

findings.title: Kreuzfahrtschiff: Zwei weitere Passagiere positiv auf Hantavirus getestet
findings.summary: Nach dem Hantavirus-Ausbruch auf einem Kreuzfahrtschiff sind zwei weitere Passagiere positiv auf den Erreger getestet worden - eine Französin und ein US-Amerikaner. Die Evakuierung der "Hondius" ist derweil fast abgeschlossen.

Die Evakuierung der "Hondius" ist derweil fast abgeschlossen.

findings.title: More passengers from hantavirus-hit cruise ship test positive
findings.summary:
A French woman and an American national evacuated from the cruise ship hit by a deadly hantavirus outbreak have tested positive, officials said on Monday, as the complex operation to repatriate those on board continued.
The French woman, one of five passengers from France flown back from the MV Hondius and placed in isolation in Paris, started to feel unwell on Sunday night, and “tests came back positive”, said Health Minister Stephanie Rist.
One the 17 American passengers evacuated from the...

More passengers from hantavirus-hit cruise ship test positive | A French woman and an American national evacuated from the cruise ship hit by a deadly hantavirus outbreak have tested positive, officials said on Monday, as the complex operation to repatriate those on board continued.

findings.title: Passengers leave hantavirus-hit cruise ship in Tenerife as WHO says outbreak ‘not another COVID’
findings.summary: Passengers and crew from the cruise ship MV Hondius began disembarking in Tenerife on Sunday under a tightly coordinated international health operation led by Spanish authorities and the World Health Organization (WHO), as officials sought to reassure the public that the outbreak “is not another COVID.”
findings.text: Passengers leave hantavirus-hit cruise ship in Tenerife as WHO says outbreak ‘not another COVID’ | Passengers and crew from the cruise ship MV Hondius began disembarking in Tenerife on Sunday under a tightly coordinated international health operation led by Spanish authorities and the World Health Organization (WHO), as officials sought to reassure the public that the outbreak “is not another COVID.”

findings.title: Hantavirüs semptomları tahliye edilen yolcular arasında yayılıyor: DSÖ alarma geçti! ABD ve Fransa hastalık izleme uygulamalarına başladı
findings.summary: MV Hondius yolcu gemisinde ortaya çıkan hantavirüs salgını nedeniyle tahliye edilen yolculardan bazılarında hastalık belirtileri gözlemlendi. Fransa’ya götürülen bir yolcunun uçakta semptom göstermesi üzerine 5 kişi sıkı izolasyona alınırken, ABD’ye dönen 17 ABD'li yolcu ise Omaha’daki federal karantina merkezinde gözetim altında tutuluyor. Dünya Sağlık Örgütü (DSÖ), hastalığın hantavirüsün nadir bir türü olan insandan insana bulaşabilen Andes virüsü olduğunu doğruladı.
findings.text: Hantavirüs semptomları tahliye edilen yolcular arasında yayılıyor: DSÖ alarma geçti! ABD ve Fransa hastalık izleme uygulamalarına başladı | MV Hondius yolcu gemisinde ortaya çıkan hantavirüs salgını nedeniyle tahliye edilen yolculardan bazılarında hastalık belirtileri gözlemlendi. Fransa’ya götürülen bir yolcunun uçakta semptom göstermesi üzerine 5 kişi sıkı izolasyona alınırken, ABD’ye dönen 17 ABD'li yolcu ise Omaha’daki federal karantina merkezinde gözetim altında tutuluyor. Dünya Sağlık Örgütü (DSÖ), hastalığın hantavirüsün nadir bir türü olan insandan insana bulaşabilen Andes virüsü olduğunu doğruladı.

findings.title: «Вирусам наплевать на политику, и они не уважают границы». На Тенерифе приняли лайнер, где произошла вспышка хантавируса. Пассажиры здоровы и отправляются домой после нескольких недель страха и неопределенности
findings.summary: Лайнер MV Hondius со вспышкой хантавируса на борту пришел к порту Гранадилья на Тенерифе, Канарские острова. Ранее три человека скончались от вируса. Всего хантавирус был выявлен у восьми человек. После нескольких недель неопределенности пассажиров начали эвакуировать и отправлять домой под медицинским контролем.   Жители и власти Тенерифе опасались, что судно может стать источником новой вспышки, однако ВОЗ и европейские эпидемиологи уверяют, что риск для населения низкий, а распространение ...

findings.title: ‘It was either this or the pool’: hantavirus ship becomes latest Tenerife tourist attraction
findings.summary: The MV Hondius, the cruise ship hit by an outbreak of a virus that has left three dead, reached the Canary Islands on SundayOn a dusty hill overlooking the Atlantic Ocean in the south of Tenerife, groups of tourists and locals are gathered to witness one of the island’s best new attractions.Some are gazing through binoculars while others are taking photos on their phones of a vessel only a few hundreds metres away, anchored near the Granadillo commercial port. Continue reading...

findings.title: Passageiros começam a deixar navio onde houve surto de hantavírus
findings.summary:
Passageiros e tripulantes do navio MV Hondius começaram a ser retirados da embarcação na manhã deste domingo (10), quase um mês após um surto de hantavírus matar três pessoas a bordo.

Quatorze espanhóis, sendo 13 passageiros e um membro da tripulação, foram os primeiros a deixar o navio, por volta das 5h30 de hoje (horário de Brasília).

Notícias relacionadas:Países europeus irão retirar cidadãos de navio com surto de hantavírus.OMS reporta seis casos confirmados de hantavírus ligados a cruz...

findings.title: Ölüm gemisinde yeni sır: Hantavirüs gemiye nereden geldi?
findings.summary: Güney Amerika’dan yola çıkan MV Hondius adlı yolcu gemisinde yaşanan ölümcül hantavirüs salgınında dikkat çekici yeni bir iddia ortaya atıldı. İlk başta virüsün Arjantin’in en güneyindeki Ushuaia’da bulaşmış olabileceği düşünülüyordu. Ancak yeni bilgiler, salgının gerçek başlangıç noktasının çok daha kuzeyde, Patagonya bölgesinde olabileceğini gösteriyor.

findings.title: Hong Kong leverages ‘unrivalled’ medical hub status amid global hantavirus alarm
findings.summary:
Hong Kong will act as a global partner in pandemic preparedness, leveraging its “unrivalled” status as a medical innovation hub to combat emerging health threats such as a recent hantavirus outbreak on a cruise ship, the city’s leader and health chief have said.
Speaking at the Asia Summit on Global Health on Monday, Chief Executive John Lee Ka-chiu underscored the city’s commitment and strategic role in medical innovation.
“Our status as a leading hub for scientific innovation is unrivalled ...

Speaking at the Asia Summit on Global Health on Monday, Chief Executive John Lee Ka-chiu underscored the city’s commitment and strategic role in medical innovation.

findings.title: Paratroopers jump onto Britain’s most remote inhabited island for hantavirus mission
findings.summary:
British paratroopers landed on a “golf course covered in rocks” to supply medical personnel and oxygen to Britain’s most remote overseas territory as it deals with a suspected hantavirus case, an army commander said on Sunday.
The UK Health Security Agency confirmed on Friday that a British national had disembarked from the cruise ship MV Hondius to the South Atlantic island of Tristan da Cunha, where they live, with a suspected case of hantavirus.
Six paratroopers, a Royal Air Force (RAF)...

findings.summary: Es ist, als lebten sie neben einem kreischenden Staubsauger: Grindwale in der Straße von Gibraltar haben mit dem ständigen Schiffslärm zu kämpfen. Forscher haben jetzt festgestellt, dass die Tiere ihre Kommunikation daran anpassen.

findings.title: Endemic, epidemic, pandemic: What's the difference?
findings.summary: The Andes hantavirus outbreak shows how easily disease labels are misunderstood — and why they describe patterns of spread, not how dangerous a virus is.

findings.title: On Our Radar
findings.summary: On Our Radar scans conflicts and crises around the globe every week and features some of the hotspots Crisis Group’s analysts are closely watching. Whether an under-reported trend or a headline-grabbing development, our field experts explain why it matters or what should be done.
findings.text: On Our Radar | On Our Radar scans conflicts and crises around the globe every week and features some of the hotspots Crisis Group’s analysts are closely watching. Whether an under-reported trend or a headline-grabbing development, our field experts explain why it matters or what should be done.

findings.title: ¿Te falta el aire? Así afecta el asma a los pulmones; estas son las señales de una crisis peligrosa
findings.summary: ¿Qué es el asma? Este padecimiento inflama y oprime las vías respiratorias, provoca desde tos y silbidos al respirar hasta crisis graves. En casos extremos, los labios de los pacientes se ponen azules.
findings.text: ¿Te falta el aire? Así afecta el asma a los pulmones; estas son las señales de una crisis peligrosa | ¿Qué es el asma? Este padecimiento inflama y oprime las vías respiratorias, provoca desde tos y silbidos al respirar hasta crisis graves. En casos extremos, los labios de los pacientes se ponen azules.

findings.title: Indonesia warns of becoming hub for transnational cybercrime networks following Jakarta, Batam raids
findings.summary: Police arrested 321 people in the West Jakarta raid on May 7 and 210 people in the May 6 Batam raid. Many were foreigners who reportedly entered Indonesia using its visa-free or visa-on-arrival facilities.
findings.text: Indonesia warns of becoming hub for transnational cybercrime networks following Jakarta, Batam raids | Police arrested 321 people in the West Jakarta raid on May 7 and 210 people in the May 6 Batam raid. Many were foreigners who reportedly entered Indonesia using its visa-free or visa-on-arrival facilities.

findings.title: Est de la RDC: le gouverneur intérimaire du Sud-Kivu décrète la suspension du trafic entre Bukavu et Uvira
findings.summary: En République démocratique du Congo (RDC), le trafic entre Bukavu et Uvira est de nouveau suspendu à partir de ce 11 mai 2026, à peine un mois après sa reprise. L’annonce a été faite le 9 mai par le vice-gouverneur et gouverneur intérimaire du Sud-Kivu, Jean-Jacques Elakano. Il invoque des impératifs sécuritaires.

L’annonce a été faite le 9 mai par le vice-gouverneur et gouverneur intérimaire du Sud-Kivu, Jean-Jacques Elakano. Il invoque des impératifs sécuritaires.
